headline: Woman's 'Soft Launch' Was So Soft Nobody Realized She Was Dating A Mannequin From A Department Store
summary: She posted 47 photos of 'him' in different outfits. The mannequin never blinked. She called it 'mysterious.'
fullBody: Jessica Softlaunch posted 47 photos of her 'mysterious new boyfriend.' Turns out, it was Derek — a mannequin from Nordstrom's men's section. 'He's a great listener,' Jessica said. 'And he never argues.' Her friends staged an intervention. 'He's not real,' they said. 'He's real to me,' Jessica replied. Derek has since been bought by Jessica's mom. They are now 'living together.' Her therapist is 'concerned but intrigued.'
